hero.title: Renovations that transform spaces
hero.subtitle: Design, quality and experience at the service of your home

about.title: Experts in comprehensive renovations
about.text: We are Navagli, a company with over 20 years of experience in comprehensive renovations, rehabilitation and interior design in Barcelona and its metropolitan area. We specialize in transforming residential and commercial spaces with the highest quality standards, premium materials and a team of professionals committed to detail. Each project is unique and we treat it as such, offering personalized solutions adapted to your needs and budget.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: We offer complete solutions for all types of renovations and interior design projects

integral.title: Comprehensive Renovations
integral.description: We completely transform your home, managing all trades and coordinating each phase of the project to guarantee an impeccable result.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Renovations
kitchen.description: We design and build modern, functional kitchens adapted to your lifestyle and the available space.

bathroom.title: Bathroom Renovations
bathroom.description: We renovate your bathrooms with high-quality materials, achieving elegant, functional and durable spaces.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.description: We create unique, personalized environments, combining aesthetics and functionality to reflect your personality in every corner.

rehabilitation.title: Rehabilitation
rehabilitation.description: We restore buildings and homes with structural and finishing rehabilitation works, complying with all current regulations.

commercial.title: Commercial Premises
commercial.description: We design and carry out the renovation of your commercial premises, enhancing brand image and customer experience.

office.title: Office
office.description: We optimize workspaces to improve productivity and wellbeing for your team, with modern and functional designs.

cta.title: Do you have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your idea and we will prepare a free quote

footer.tagline: Specialists in comprehensive renovations in Barcelona.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Learn about the history and values of Navagli
aboutPage.historyText: Navagli was born more than two decades ago from a passion for architecture and a commitment to quality. What started as a small team of professionals with high expectations has become one of the leading renovation companies in Barcelona.
aboutPage.philosophyText: We believe that every renovation is an opportunity to improve people's quality of life. That's why we get involved in each project as if it were our own, listening, advising and executing with precision.

values.qualityText: We use first-class materials and finishes
values.commitmentText: We meet agreed deadlines and budgets
values.trustText: Total transparency throughout the entire process
values.innovationText: Modern designs adapted to the latest trends

aboutPage.experienceText: More than 500 projects completed, satisfied clients throughout the metropolitan area of Barcelona and a team of more than 30 professionals specialized in each area of the sector.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: We are here to help you

reformas.heroTitle: Your home, transformed from start to finish
reformas.heroSubtitle: We manage every phase of your renovation: design, materials, execution and finishes.
reformas.introText: At Navagli we take care of the entire process, from the initial visit to the delivery of keys. We coordinate every trade, control timelines and guarantee quality at every stage. Your stress-free renovation, in the hands of experts with over 20 years of experience.

kitchen.title: Kitchens
kitchen.desc: We design and build modern, functional kitchens. We work with the best brands in cabinetry, silestone or quartz countertops and integrated appliances.

bathroom.title: Bathrooms
bathroom.desc: We renovate bathrooms with premium materials: porcelain tiles, custom shower trays, screens, wall-hung sanitary ware and LED lighting solutions.

floors.title: Floors and tiling
floors.desc: We install and renovate all types of flooring: parquet, porcelain, microcement, mosaic and vinyl. We advise on material choice based on use and style.

exterior.title: Exteriors and facades
exterior.desc: We renovate terraces, balconies, gardens and facades. Waterproofing, exterior paving, cladding and structural review with weather-resistant finishes.

interior.title: Interior design and layout
interior.desc: We redistribute spaces, add or remove partitions and design the optimal layout to maximise light, space and comfort in your home.

rehab.title: Rehabilitation
rehab.desc: Structural rehabilitation of facades, roofs and common areas. With professional direction and strict compliance with current regulations.

s1.title: Visit and assessment
s1.desc: We visit the space free of charge, assess the current condition and listen to your needs before proposing any solution.

s2.title: Design and fixed quote
s2.desc: We produce a detailed technical project with materials, timelines and a fixed price. Full transparency, no surprises at the end.

s3.title: Execution and monitoring
s3.desc: We coordinate all trades and carry out quality checks at every phase. You will receive progress updates throughout the project.

s4.title: Handover and guarantee
s4.desc: We hand over the completed work clean, reviewed and with all documentation. Post-works guarantee and after-sales service included.

pintura.heroSubtitle: Exclusive artisan techniques that turn walls and surfaces into unique design elements.
pintura.whatText: Decorative painting is an artisan discipline that combines natural pigments, textures and hand-applied techniques to create unique, unrepeatable finishes. Unlike conventional painting, each work is a personalised piece that visually transforms the space without the need for major works. Our specialised technicians adapt each technique to the client's style and the characteristics of the space.

whatPoints.p4: Applicable to walls, floors and furniture

venetian.title: Venetian Plaster
venetian.desc: A classical-inspired finish achieved with multiple layers of lime plaster and natural pigments. It adds depth, satin sheen and a texture that imitates polished marble.

microcement.title: Microcement
microcement.desc: An ultra-thin continuous coating applicable to existing walls, floors and furniture without construction works. Resistant, waterproof and available in over 50 shades.

chalk.title: Distemper, Limewash and Matte
chalk.desc: Traditional techniques renewed with modern formulations for soft, enveloping matte finishes. Perfect for Nordic, rustic and Mediterranean-style interiors.

effects.title: Special Effects and Murals
effects.desc: Stone, concrete or wood imitations and custom artistic murals. We work with the client to design unique compositions tailored to the space.

s1.title: Consultation and technique selection
s1.desc: We advise on the most suitable technique based on the space, natural light and desired decorating style.

s2.title: Surface preparation
s2.desc: Cleaning, sanding and application of specific primer to ensure perfect adhesion and maximum durability.

s3.title: Artisan application
s3.desc: Our technicians apply the technique in successive layers, respecting drying times for a flawless result.

s4.title: Sealing and protection
s4.desc: Finishing with varnish, wax or sealer according to the chosen technique, to protect the surface and ease maintenance.

asesoria.heroTitle: The expert team by your side from day one
asesoria.heroSubtitle: Architects, interior designers and specialist technicians who guide your project with expertise and precision.
asesoria.introText: At Navagli we have a multidisciplinary team of professionals who accompany you from the initial idea to the final result. We help you make informed decisions, optimise your investment and avoid the most common mistakes in renovation and construction projects. Because a good project starts with good advice.

introBenefits.b1: Technical project with full legal guarantees
introBenefits.b2: Detailed budget with no hidden costs

arch.title: Architecture and Design
arch.desc: Our architects produce complete technical projects, manage major and minor works permits, and ensure compliance with urban planning, accessibility and energy efficiency regulations.

designer.title: Interior Design
designer.desc: We create 3D design proposals so you can visualise the result before starting. We select materials, colour palettes, furniture and lighting with aesthetic and functional coherence.

specialist.title: Specialist Technicians
specialist.desc: Certified installers for electrical, plumbing, HVAC and home automation. All work is delivered with an installation certificate and complies with current regulations.

viability.title: Feasibility study
viability.desc: We analyse the technical, economic and regulatory feasibility of your project before committing any resources.

licenses.title: Permit management
licenses.desc: We handle all permits and licences with local authorities and relevant bodies. No bureaucracy for you.

budget.title: Cost control
budget.desc: We produce detailed budgets and monitor execution so that actual costs do not deviate from what was agreed.

vendors.title: Supplier coordination
vendors.desc: We select trusted suppliers, negotiate terms and coordinate deliveries to guarantee timelines and material quality.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.body: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyse traffic on our website.
